entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY AND BRISK
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 20 TO 25 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 35 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS AROUND 17
NORTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING WEST IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SNOW AND RAIN SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LITTLE OR NO SNOW ACCUMULATION
LOWS IN THE LOWER 30S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH
CHANCE OF PRECIPITATION 30 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY IN THE MORNING, THEN CLEARING
NOT AS COOL WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
LOWS IN THE MID 40S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
